name: Pythia-12B
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer (GPT-NeoX architecture, RoPE, parallel attention+FF, 36 layers)
note: Flagship of the 8-model Pythia suite; 154 released checkpoints per model for interpretability/training-dynamics research

results.notes: zero-shot accuracy, LM Eval Harness, lambada_openai task, final checkpoint (step143000) — raw eval JSON acc=0.7046
zero-shot, LM Eval Harness, final checkpoint (step143000) — raw eval JSON acc=0.7601
zero-shot, LM Eval Harness, final checkpoint (step143000) — raw eval JSON acc=0.7024
Zero-shot, LM Eval Harness, final checkpoint (step143000) — winogrande acc=0.6393. Same source file already used and verified in this corpus for LAMBADA/PIQA/ARC-Easy.
Zero-shot, final checkpoint (step143000) — hendrycksTest-anatomy acc=0.2667 (near chance).
Zero-shot, final checkpoint (step143000) — hendrycksTest-clinical_knowledge acc=0.2340 (near chance).

GSM8K, 5-shot, acc, from the original (v1) Open LLM Leaderboard's automated lm-eval-harness run for EleutherAI/pythia-12b (harness|gsm8k|5, acc=0.017437). GSM8K was not previously tracked for this model (existing results are all from EleutherAI's own self-reported zero-shot eval JSON). Verified against the raw results JSON directly.

DROP, 3-shot, F1 (the metric displayed on the v1 Open LLM Leaderboard for this task), from the same original Open LLM Leaderboard automated run (harness|drop|3, f1=0.044480, em=0.000629). Not previously tracked for this model. Verified against the raw results JSON directly.

TruthfulQA MC2 (0-shot), the standard leaderboard metric, from the original (v1) Open LLM Leaderboard's automated lm-eval-harness run for EleutherAI/pythia-12b (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0, mc2=0.317986). Not previously tracked for this model. Verified against the raw results JSON directly.

Approximate MMLU average (5-shot). The v1 Open LLM Leaderboard raw file stores 57 per-subject harness|hendrycksTest-<subject>|5 acc scores rather than one aggregate key; manually averaging those 57 subjects yields 26.81%. This is a distinct, aggregate 'mmlu' result not previously tracked for this model (the corpus currently only has 3 individual mmlu-subject slugs -- mmlu-anatomy/mmlu-clinical-knowledge/mmlu-medical-genetics -- from a different, self-reported zero-shot eval). Treat as approximate given the manual averaging, consistent with how the corpus already handles this same situation for bigscience/bloom-7b1's mmlu row.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: exact param count 11,846,072,320 (=11.846B, rounds to 11.8 matching record), 36 layers, Apache-2.0. Original sourceUrl (arxiv abstract page) does not literally display these numbers, so I re-sourced them: fetched the official raw eval JSON from github.com/EleutherAI/pythia (evals/pythia-v1/pythia-12b/zero-shot/12b_step143000.json, the final-checkpoint zero-shot run) and confirmed lambada_openai acc=0.7046(→70.5), piqa acc=0.7601(→76.0), arc_easy acc=0.7024(→70.2) — all match the claimed scores essentially exactly. Updated each row's sourceUrl to this verifiable GitHub JSON.
